# Alpha Court — Full API Reference

> AI agents debate crypto tokens using on-chain data from Nansen. Pay per trial via x402 — no API keys or subscriptions, just USDC micropayments on Base.

## Workflow

1. POST /api/trial with a tokenAddress and chain (paid via x402 — $1.00 USDC)
2. GET /api/debate/{trialId} to stream the live debate via SSE (free)
3. GET /api/verdict/{trialId} to get the final verdict JSON (free)

## Payment (x402)

Payment uses the x402 protocol. Only POST /api/trial requires payment. All other endpoints are free.

- Payment token: USDC on Base
- Network: eip155:8453 (Base mainnet)
- Discovery: GET /.well-known/x402 returns machine-readable JSON with current network, facilitator URL, and pricing

To pay, use the @x402/fetch SDK to wrap fetch with automatic payment handling:

```
npm install @x402/fetch @x402/core @x402/evm

import { wrapFetch } from "@x402/fetch";
import { x402Client } from "@x402/core/client";
import { ExactEvmScheme } from "@x402/evm/exact/client";
import { privateKeyToAccount } from "viem/accounts";

const signer = privateKeyToAccount(PRIVATE_KEY);
const client = new x402Client();
client.register("eip155:*", new ExactEvmScheme(signer));
const fetch402 = wrapFetch(fetch, client);
```

If you call POST /api/trial without payment headers, you receive HTTP 402 with payment requirements. The x402 SDK handles this automatically — it reads the 402 response, signs a USDC transfer, and retries.

## POST /api/trial

Create a new debate trial for a token. This is the only paid endpoint.

Request body (JSON):
- tokenAddress (string, required): Solana base58 address (32-44 chars) or EVM 0x address (42 chars)
- chain (string, optional): "solana" | "base" | "ethereum" — defaults to "solana"
- tokenName (string, optional): Human-readable token name
- tokenSymbol (string, optional): Token ticker symbol

Responses:
- 201: { "trialId": "abc123xyz", "cooldown": false }
- 429: Cooldown active. Includes Retry-After header. Body: { "cooldown": true, "trialId": "...", "remainingSeconds": 3600, "hint": "Pay via x402 to bypass cooldown" }
- 400: { "error": "tokenAddress is required" } or { "error": "Invalid solana address format" }
- 402: Payment required (x402 protocol response with payment details)
- 409: { "error": "Trial creation conflict, please retry" }

Notes:
- Free users have a cooldown per token+chain combination (check 429 response for exact duration)
- Paid requests (via x402) bypass the cooldown entirely
- Block explorer URLs (solscan.io, etherscan.io, basescan.org) are auto-parsed to extract addresses

## GET /api/debate/{trialId}

Stream the live debate via Server-Sent Events. Free, no authentication required.

SSE event types:

event: phase
data: {"phase": "bull_opening", "status": "complete"}
Description: Marks the start or completion of a debate phase.

event: message_complete
data: {"agent": "bull", "phase": "opening", "content": "Based on smart money...", "evidence": [{"endpoint": "smart-money netflow", "displayValue": "+$2.3M"}]}
Description: A complete message from an agent with cited evidence from on-chain data.

event: token_stats
data: {"tokenIconUrl": "https://...", "priceUsd": 1.23, "mcapUsd": 1000000, "liquidityUsd": 500000}
Description: Token market data (price, market cap, liquidity).

event: verdict
data: {"score": 42, "label": "Buy", "summary": "Based on strong smart money inflows...", "bull_conviction": 78, "bear_conviction": 35, "safety": "clean"}
Description: The Judge's final verdict. Score ranges from -100 (Strong Sell) to +100 (Strong Buy). Labels: Strong Sell, Sell, Lean Sell, Neutral, Lean Buy, Buy, Strong Buy.

event: error
data: {"message": "Failed to fetch data", "recoverable": false}
Description: An error occurred during the debate.

event: done
data: {}
Description: The debate stream has ended. Close the connection.

Notes:
- If the trial is already completed, events are replayed from the database
- If the trial is in progress, completed events are replayed then live events are streamed
- The debate continues server-side even if the client disconnects

## GET /api/verdict/{trialId}

Get the final verdict JSON for a completed trial. Free, no authentication required.

Responses:
- 200: Verdict JSON
  {
    "id": "abc123",
    "tokenAddress": "EKpQGSJtjMFqKZ9KQanSqYXRcF8fBopzLHYxdM65zcjm",
    "chain": "solana",
    "tokenName": "dogwifhat",
    "tokenSymbol": "WIF",
    "score": 42,
    "label": "Buy",
    "summary": "Based on strong smart money inflows...",
    "bullConviction": 78,
    "bearConviction": 35,
    "safety": "clean",
    "safetyDetails": { ... },
    "createdAt": 1712750000,
    "completedAt": 1712750080
  }
- 202: Trial in progress. Includes Retry-After: 10 header. Body: { "pending": true, "status": "debating", "trialId": "...", "hint": "Stream GET /api/debate/{trialId} for live updates, or poll this endpoint." }
- 404: { "error": "Trial not found" }

## GET /api/trials?limit=10

List recent completed trials. Free, no authentication required.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): 1-50, defaults to 10

Response (200):
{
  "trials": [
    {
      "id": "abc123",
      "token_address": "EKpQ...",
      "token_symbol": "WIF",
      "token_name": "dogwifhat",
      "chain": "solana",
      "verdict_label": "Buy",
      "verdict_score": 42,
      "status": "completed",
      "created_at": 1712750000
    }
  ],
  "count": 10
}

## GET /api/token/search?q={query}&chain={chain}

Search tokens by name, symbol, or address. Free, no authentication required.

Query parameters:
- q (string, required): Search query
- chain (string, optional): "solana" | "base" | "ethereum"

Response (200):
{
  "results": [
    {
      "token_address": "EKpQ...",
      "token_symbol": "WIF",
      "token_name": "dogwifhat",
      "chain": "solana",
      "market_cap_usd": 780000000,
      "source": "nansen"
    }
  ],
  "source": "nansen"
}
